style_effects: Gentle, iridescent fairy dust particles drift upwards in slow, delicate spirals around Aerodactyl, refracting soft pastel light into prismatic hues. Its body emits a warm, pearlescent glow with a petal-shaped aura that pulses gently like blooming flowers, casting faint musical note vibrations in the air. The lighting mood is a serene, blush-pink luminescence that bathes the scene in a dreamy, enchanted atmosphere. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
